entries.summary: Phase 6 implemented browser-side LLM inference infrastructure: WebLLM service with CreateMLCEngine API, model download management with progress/ETA/cancellation, model readiness gate with WebGPU/memory/cache checks, RAG orchestrator connecting embedding→vector→keyword→RRF→rerank→LLM pipeline, and WebGPU context loss recovery watchdog. 5 tasks completed with 130+ new tests.
top_rejection_reasons: API mismatch with dependencies (wrong method names/signatures)
Non-functional code paths (WASM fallback, sync busy-wait)
lessons_learned: web-llm v0.2.83 has NO WASM backend — only WebGPU. Remove WASM fallback entirely.
Reviewers catch API mismatches between services (reranker .query vs .rerank) — always verify actual signatures
Synchronous busy-wait for async APIs is fundamentally broken in JS — microtasks can't execute during sync loops
Cancel race conditions require _cancelled flag reset at start + finally block cleanup, not in cancel method
tree-sitter false positives on .tsx JSX are expected — treat as PASS when tsconfig has jsx: react-jsx
